text: I find myself engulfed in an environment brimming with stimuli. The clarity of my vision wavers, and dazzling reflections off glass and light combine with cryptic symbols—R + D—on the wall. The textual message I encounter speaks of confusion and the fragility of perception. Immersed in these sensations, I am reminded that even in structured, research-driven spaces, certainty can vanish, replaced momentarily by ambiguity. This makes me feel curious, even humbled, as I consider just how thin the boundary is between order and chaos in thought and sight.
